document_id: 5.中华人民共和国能源法__中国政府网.html

extracted_info.title: Energy Law of the People's Republic of China
extracted_info.affected_sectors: Energy sector, including coal, oil, natural gas, nuclear, hydropower, wind, solar, biomass, geothermal, and marine energy, as well as electricity, heat, and hydrogen
key_requirements: Promote high-quality energy development, ensure national energy security, and support the green and low-carbon transformation of the economy and society
Establish a clean, low-carbon, safe, and efficient new energy system

Implement the new energy security strategy, including energy consumption revolution, energy supply revolution, energy technology revolution, energy system reform, and comprehensive international cooperation
